items.title: Rust-proof your code with our new Testing Handbook chapter
items.summary: We’ve added a new chapter to our Testing Handbook: a comprehensive guide to security testing Rust programs. This chapter covers the tools and techniques we use at Trail of Bits to validate the security of Rust programs and systems. fn main() {(|f:&dyn Fn(u128)->Box< dyn Iterator<

items.title: GPT-5.5-Cyber built a zlib fuzzing lab in a day
items.summary: We’re running Patch the Planet, an ongoing collaboration with OpenAI that pairs Trail of Bits engineers directly with more than 30 open-source projects. Its goal is to front-run a serious problem facing open-source maintainers: highly capable models like GPT-5.5-Cyber will soon c

items.title: Mizuho says Circle bank approval doesn't solve USDC growth, stablecoin competition risks
items.summary: Japanese investment bank Mizuho reiterated its neutral rating on Circle, saying OCC approval for a national trust bank doesn't address slowing USDC growth or rising competition.

items.title: Wall Street transfer agents lobby SEC, warning that third-party tokens pose risks to market integrity
items.summary: The Securities Transfer Association, an industry group for transfer agents, said company-authorized tokenization should receive preferential treatment under future rules.

items.title: Bitcoin threatens $62K in risk-asset rout as President Trump says US will 'run' closed Hormuz Strait
items.summary: Bitcoin bulls faced an uphill struggle to preserve $62,000 as stocks opened down on Strait of Hormuz rhetoric between the US and Iran.

items.title: Mutation testing comes to DAML
items.summary: In April we released Mewt, our open-source mutation-testing engine that finds the gaps in your test suite. Today we’re expanding it with support for DAML, the language Canton Network applications are written in. Mewt now reads DAML, generates several classes of mutants (including

items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin holds $62,600 as the Iran conflict reignites and CPI looms
items.summary: Trump reinstated the Hormuz blockade, sending oil higher and rate-hike bets up, reversing the peace trade that helped bitcoin recover in early July. Today's inflation print is the next test.

items.title: U.S. government moves $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime
items.summary: Coins from the Farace and BTC-e seizures moved through fresh wallets before landing on the exchange, despite president Donald Trump's previous no-sell reserve order.

items.title: Solo bitcoin miner makes $200,000 using $150 equipment
items.summary: Solo Bitcoin mining has surged, with 24 blocks found in the past 12 months, a 41% increase year over year.

items.title: Bitcoin slips as traders lift July Fed rate hike bets ahead of Inflation report
items.summary: Major cryptocurrencies have dropped by 2% or more in 24 hours as traders boosted bets of a July Fed rate hike.

items.title: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
items.summary: South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.

items.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $425M outflow after brief rebound
items.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw their largest single-day outflows in July, with $424.66 million leaving the funds, reversing a brief return to positive weekly flows.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt to report for military training: Report
items.summary: Witt’s departure comes during a critical moment for the CLARITY Act, with deputy director Harry Jung expected to assume his responsibilities.

items.title: US government moves $297M in seized Bitcoin, Ether to Coinbase Prime
items.summary: The transfers have raised questions over Trump’s Bitcoin reserve pledge, though deposits to Coinbase Prime do not confirm an impending sale.

items.title: Thai scammer's $122M wallet, Japan embraces crypto credit: Asia Express
items.summary: Bitcoin backed mortgages and stablecoin yield are hot topics in Japan right now, as Hyundai experiments with Avalanche for global stablecoin transfers. Asia Express

items.title: CLARITY Act gains second law enforcement endorsement before Senate push
items.summary: The Federal Law Enforcement Officers Association expressed support for the CLARITY Act but urged changes to the legislation’s language.

items.title: Binance.US CEO says exchange is rebuilding, eyes return to 20% U.S. market share
items.summary: Binance.US is betting ultra-low fees, new regulated products and deeper liquidity will help it regain customers after two years of regulatory setbacks.

items.title: Franklin Crypto CIO says crypto prices are disconnected from fundamentals
items.summary: Institutional adoption of crypto is accelerating even as digital asset prices fail to reflect the industry's strongest fundamentals in years, Seth Ginns said.

items.title: TeraWulf CEO: 'Not All Megawatts Are Created Equally' in AI Race
items.summary: TeraWulf says its $19 billion AI hosting agreement with Anthropic underscores its transformation from a Bitcoin miner into an AI infrastructure company.
